title: Living with a SEAL
author: Travis Bradberry
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A grueling 7-day calendar grid. 6 days are ash (done). 1 day is RED (the day that breaks the trainee). The SEAL trident emblem sits centered in the gap. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1100)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">
    <!-- 7 day cells in a row -->
    <g>
      <g transform="translate(-600 0)">
        <rect x="-90" y="-80" width="180" height="200" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
        <text x="0" y="0" font-size="120" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">1</text>
        <text x="0" y="50" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">0500</text>
        <text x="0" y="80" font-size="11" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">PUSH-UPS</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(-400 0)">
        <rect x="-90" y="-80" width="180" height="200" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
        <text x="0" y="0" font-size="120" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">2</text>
        <text x="0" y="50" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">0500</text>
        <text x="0" y="80" font-size="11" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">SIT-UPS</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(-200 0)">
        <rect x="-90" y="-80" width="180" height="200" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
        <text x="0" y="0" font-size="120" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">3</text>
        <text x="0" y="50" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">0500</text>
        <text x="0" y="80" font-size="11" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">5 MILE RUN</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(0 0)">
        <rect x="-90" y="-80" width="180" height="200" fill="#fc1c46"/>
        <text x="0" y="0" font-size="120" font-weight="300" fill="#ffffff">4</text>
        <text x="0" y="50" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="0.18em">0300</text>
        <text x="0" y="80" font-size="11" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.9" letter-spacing="0.18em">OCEAN SWIM</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(200 0)">
        <rect x="-90" y="-80" width="180" height="200" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
        <text x="0" y="0" font-size="120" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">5</text>
        <text x="0" y="50" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">0500</text>
        <text x="0" y="80" font-size="11" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">OBSTACLE</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(400 0)">
        <rect x="-90" y="-80" width="180" height="200" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
        <text x="0" y="0" font-size="120" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">6</text>
        <text x="0" y="50" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">0500</text>
        <text x="0" y="80" font-size="11" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">RUCK</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(600 0)">
        <rect x="-90" y="-80" width="180" height="200" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
        <text x="0" y="0" font-size="120" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc">7</text>
        <text x="0" y="50" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">0500</text>
        <text x="0" y="80" font-size="11" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">REST</text>
      </g>
    </g>
    <!-- Top: a small trident glyph (three lines meeting at center) -->
    <g transform="translate(0 -260)" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2" fill="none">
      <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="60"/>
      <line x1="-30" y1="20" x2="-30" y2="50"/>
      <line x1="30" y1="20" x2="30" y2="50"/>
      <line x1="-30" y1="20" x2="-12" y2="38"/>
      <line x1="30" y1="20" x2="12" y2="38"/>
      <line x1="-30" y1="50" x2="-50" y2="38"/>
      <line x1="30" y1="50" x2="50" y2="38"/>
    </g>
    <text x="0" y="-180" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">SEAL TRAINING CADENCE</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A 7-day training calendar with day 4 (the ocean-swim-in-the-dark day) in RED. Each day has a 0500 / 0300 wake time and a discipline beneath. A trident glyph crowns the calendar. 260px weight-500 title at the bottom — the book is about the toughest day.
